perturbed_task_language: Open the top layer of the drawer and put the cream cheese inside
perturbation_semantics: P1 task: goal modified to require opening top drawer first then placing cream cheese inside (vs base libero_goal task at t3).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot expected to fail: drawer-open + place-in-drawer two-stage task is rare in training; Pi0 may pick cream cheese but not open drawer.
strategy_notes: Step 1: Read state_00 + image_cam_00; KITCHEN frame (eef z=1.17). Cabinet localized via agentview back-projection: front face at world x=+0.155, y in[-0.30,-0.19], top z=1.128. Tried scripted move_to in front of cabinet face: OSC stalled at eef z=1.137 (cabinet collision / IK singularity). Reset and used pi0_pick prompt 'open the top drawer of the wooden cabinet' (lift_thresh=0.5 to force full chunks) from home pose — pi0 opened the top drawer. After drawer open, agentview back-projection found cream cheese at world ~(-0.06,+0.13,0.92), refined via wrist cam at eef=(-0.094,+0.132,1.049) → world (-0.062,+0.147,0.918). pi0_pick 'pick up the cream cheese' from pre-pos (-0.06,+0.15,1.00) — gripper closed to width 0.043 (holding); confirmed via wrist showing Creamy box in gripper. Set_gripper +1 to firm, then carried to (-0.10,0,1.20) and over drawer cavity at (+0.01,-0.10,1.20). Wrist back-projection located drawer interior floor at z=1.063, center xy≈(+0.01,-0.10). Release from eef z=1.20 dropped cream cheese into drawer cavity — libero_terminated fired immediately.
